rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use visible feature names and concrete bounds when defining assumptions and guarantees in AGREE contracts
Ensure helper declarations match the actual types of expressions used in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range checks using boolean expressions like `x >= min and x <= max`
Place annex agree blocks in appropriate AADL scopes based on whether they reference component types or implementations
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific port assumptions in component type scopes
Avoid mismatched types in AGREE helper declarations and expressions
